title: Add ability to filter for a specific date
excerpt:
I really need the option to filter for a specific date if the field is a date field. 
Currently the only options are Today, Tomorrow, Yesterday etc. But there is no way to select the exact date in the simple filters. Als…

posts.author: apilolli (Apryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
I really need the option to filter for a specific date if the field is a date field.

Currently the only options are Today, Tomorrow, Yesterday etc. But there is no way to select the exact date in the simple filters. Also, in the advance filters when you select the date “is” there is no option for exact date either. Instead you have to select the date “is between” and select the same exact date in the start and end field.

Screenshot 2023-02-03 at 11.06.28 PM2036×1008 341 KB

Screenshot 2023-02-03 at 11.06.08 PM2120×1314 458 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @apilolli - this is possible. Change the drop down to “is only” and then scroll to the bottom to select “Exact Date”.

image736×465 34.5 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark
